title: Xtra Smoky Spanish Sweet Potato Croquettes
description: Smoky sweet potato croquettes wrapped in banana leaves, perfect for a solo dinner, featuring brown sugar and a crumbly texture, all made possible with an ice bath shock to lock in the flavors.

ingredients.name: sweet potatoes
ingredients.notes: peeled and chopped into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Boil the chopped sweet potatoes in salted water until they are tender, then immediately submerge them in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the sweet potatoes have cooled, mash them in a bowl with a fork until they are mostly smooth.
Add the brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Gradually add the flour to the bowl, mixing until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and wrap each disk in a banana leaf, securing the leaf with a toothpick if necessary.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the croquettes until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the croquettes from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the croquettes hot and enjoy.
